name: perception-and-hierarchy-principles
description: Framework-agnostic design principles for visual perception and hierarchy: how the eye groups elements, where it lands first, and what makes a composition read as ordered. Covers Hierarchy, Proximity, Signal-to-Noise Ratio, Color, Alignment, Legibility, Readability, Gestalt Similarity, Closure, and Figure-Ground Relationship.

interface.shortDescription: Visual perception, hierarchy, layout, and attention.
interface.longDescription: Framework-agnostic design principles for visual perception and hierarchy: how the eye groups elements, where it lands first, and what makes a composition read as ordered. Covers Hierarchy, Proximity, Signal-to-Noise Ratio, Color, Alignment, Legibility, Readability, Gestalt Similarity, Closure, and Figure-Ground Relationship.
